questions.question: Which of the following is a statement?

options.text: “Could you explain this problem?”
“Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.”
“Open the window, please.”
“Does this bus go downtown?”

questions.question: What is the contrapositive of “If it rains, then the ground will be wet”?

options.text: If the ground is not wet, then it has not rained.
If the ground is wet, then it has rained.
If it does not rain, then the ground is not wet.
If it rains, then the ground is not wet.

questions.question: Which of the following is a valid conditional statement?

options.text: “If the ground is wet, then it might be due to rain.”
“If it rains, then the ground is wet.”
“If it rains, then it might not rain.”
“If it rains, the sun is shining.”

questions.question: Which of the following is a converse of: “If you study, then you will pass”?

options.text: If you pass, then you study.
If you do not study, then you do not pass.
If you do not pass, then you do not study.
If you pass, then you studied.

questions.question: Identify the inverse of: “If it is snowing, then it is cold.”

options.text: If it is not snowing, then it is not cold.
If it is cold, then it is snowing.
If it is not cold, then it is not snowing.
If it is not snowing, then it is cold.

questions.question: Which of the following is a contrapositive?

options.text: If P, then not Q.
If not Q, then not P.
If Q, then P.
If not P, then Q.

questions.question:
If a light is red (P), then cars must stop (Q).
Which one of the following is the correct inverse of this statement?

options.text: If a light is not red, then cars do not stop.
If cars do not stop, then the light is not red.
If cars must stop, then the light is red.
If the light is red, then cars do not stop.

questions.question:
If a student passes the final exam (P), then they graduate (Q).
Which one of the following must be true?

options.text: If a student does not graduate, they did not pass the final exam.
If a student graduates, they passed the final exam.
If a student did not pass the final exam, they graduate.
A student passes the final exam if they do not graduate.

questions.question:
If a person is an adult (P), then they can vote (Q).
Which one of the following is true?

options.text: A person who can vote is not an adult.
A person who is not an adult can vote.
A person who cannot vote is an adult.
A person who can not vote is not an adult.

questions.question:
If a food item is perishable (P), then it must be refrigerated (Q).
Which one of the following must be true?

options.text: A food item that is not perishable is not refrigerated.
A perishable food item is not refrigerated.
A food item that is not refrigerated is not perishable.
A refrigerated food item is perishable.

questions.question:
In a culinary school, every student who learns baking also learns chocolate making. No student who learns flavour balancing learns baking.
Which one of the following must be true?

options.text: If Sandra learns baking, she also learns flavour balancing.
If Raj learns flavour balancing, he also learns baking.
If Leah learns chocolate making, she must learn baking.
If Tom learns flavour balancing, he cannot learn baking.

questions.question:
In a book club, anyone who reads fiction also reads history. No one who reads biographies reads fiction.
Which one of the following cannot be true?

options.text: Alex reads biographies and history.
Beth does not read history nor fiction.
Carl reads biographies and fiction.
Dana reads fiction but not biographies.

questions.question:
In a fitness challenge, if a participant completes the running challenge, they also complete the swimming challenge. No participant who completes the yoga challenge completes the swimming challenge.
Which one of the following must be true?

options.text: If Ethan completes the yoga challenge, he also completes the running challenge.
If Fiona completes the swimming challenge, she also completes the running challenge.
If Greg completes the swimming challenge, then he does not participate in the yoga challenge.
If Hannah completes the yoga challenge, she also completes the running challenge.

questions.question:
At a science fair, everyone who participated in chemistry experiments also participated in physics experiments. No one who participated in biology experiments participated in chemistry experiments.
Which one of the following cannot be true?

options.text: Jamie participated in chemistry and physics experiments.
Kim does not participate in chemistry nor physics experiments.
Lee participated in biology and chemistry experiments.
None of the above

questions.question:
In an office, anyone who has access to the executive lounge also has access to the rooftop. No one with access to the server room has access to the executive lounge.
Which one of the following must be true?

options.text: If Nina has access to the server room, she also has access to the rooftop.
If Pete has access to the executive lounge, he also has access to the rooftop.
If Ollie has access to the rooftop, he also has access to the executive lounge.
If Quinn has access to the server room, she cannot have access to the rooftop.

questions.question:
In a math competition, if a contestant solves the algebra problem, they also solve the geometry problem. No contestant who solves the calculus problem solves the algebra problem.
Which one of the following cannot be true?

options.text: Sam does not solve geometry problems nor algebra problems.
Tia solves the algebra and geometry problems.
Usha solves the calculus and algebra problems.
None of the above

questions.question:
In a music school, anyone who learns the violin also learns the cello. No one who learns the flute learns the violin.
Which one of the following must be true?

options.text: If Wendy learns the flute, she also learns the cello.
If Xavier learns the violin, he also learns the flute.
If Yara learns the cello, she must learn the violin.
If Zack learns the flute, he cannot learn the violin.

questions.question:
At a corporate training session, everyone who attends the leadership workshop also attends the management workshop. No one who attends the IT workshop attends the leadership workshop.
Which one of the following cannot be true?

options.text: Alice does not attend the management and also not attended leadership workshops.
Bob attended the leadership and management workshops.
Carol attended the IT and leadership workshops.
None of the above

questions.question:
In a neighborhood association, if a resident participates in the recycling program, they also participate in the community gardening program. No resident in the security program participates in the recycling program.
Which one of the following must be true?

options.text: If Erin participates in the security program, she also participates in the gardening program.
If Frank participates in the gardening program, he also participates in the recycling program.
If Grace participates in the recycling program, then she also participates in the security program.
If Hank participates in the security program, he cannot participate in the recycling program.

questions.question: In a university, anyone who majors in Environmental Science also takes a course in Sustainable Development. No student majoring in Mechanical Engineering takes a course in Environmental Science. Which one of the following cannot be true?

options.text: Ivy majors in Environmental Science and takes a course in Sustainable Development.
Laura majors in Environmental Science only.
Kyle majors in Mechanical Engineering and takes a course in Environmental Science.
None of the above
